human_review_items.summary: Global grader refactors 363aed2 (gate removal) and c749e57 (3x weights) changed scoring semantics without bumping task.json version, so the eval UI's version-based de-emphasis cannot distinguish pre/post-refactor runs. Benchmark-wide process gap, not task-specific.

Commit f40e39e ('Strip deducible information from GEO task instructions') changed only one phrase; the message implies a broader strip than the diff supports. Carried over from prior reviews; record only.
Commit 64740d0 ('Remove answer-giving nudges from data-cleaning task prompts') edits this GEO task although its title scopes to data-cleaning. Carried over from prior reviews; record only.
